state_md_top_findings.heading: Canonical Doctrine Restore And Blocker Reporting Gate
state_md_top_findings.normalized: doctor first failed on beads db malformed pages page 261 and page 262 never used repaired by importi
state_md_top_findings.text: Doctor first failed on Beads DB malformed pages (`Page 261` and `Page 262` never used). Repaired by importing `.beads/issues.jsonl` into a fresh temp workspace DB, verifying SQLite integrity, preserving the malformed DB under `.beads/.manual_recovery/20260504T175757Z-swap`, and swapping the fresh DB into place.

state_md_top_findings.heading: Canonical Doctrine Restore And Blocker Reporting Gate
state_md_top_findings.normalized: sent blocker report and resolution update to flywheel 1
state_md_top_findings.text: Sent blocker report and resolution update to `flywheel:1`.

state_md_top_findings.heading: Canonical Doctrine Restore And Blocker Reporting Gate
state_md_top_findings.normalized: catalog remains freshness status fail freshness pct 69 7 stale invoked skills 33 jsm remains blocked
state_md_top_findings.text: Catalog remains `freshness_status=FAIL`, `freshness_pct=69.7`, `stale_invoked_skills=33`; JSM remains blocked by missing sandbox auth marker (`conflicts=39`, `needs_push=45`, `local_only=7`).

state_md_top_findings.heading: Routed-Decision Notification Gap
state_md_top_findings.normalized: flywheel topology has fleet mail identity lavenderglen canonical vault has lavenderglen token
state_md_top_findings.text: Flywheel topology has `fleet_mail_identity=LavenderGlen`; canonical vault has `LavenderGlen.token`.
